title: Use of ChatGPT is 50 times higher in rich countries than in poorer countries
subtitle: Visits to ChatGPT per internet user, May 2025
source: Liu, Huang, and Wang (2025), sourced from Semrush.
visdescription: A global map of traffic to ChatGPT per internet user and a scatter plot showing a positive correlation between GDP per capita and chatGPT usage
prompt_text: Where in the world are people using AI?
keyFactLabel: more ChatGPT usage occurs per internet user in high-income countries than in low-income countries.
legendLabel: Visits to chatGPT per 100 internet users
